# Support & Questions

If you need help, have questions, or want to discuss Rust, C#, or related topics:

- Open a [question issue](https://github.com/cuthanhcam/learn-rust/issues/new?template=question.md)
- Start a GitHub Discussion (if enabled)
- See the `docs/` folder for guides, notes, and tutorials
- Contact the maintainer: [cuthanhcam](https://github.com/cuthanhcam)

If you have a specific technical question or issue, please provide as much context as possible to help us assist you effectively.
